programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: With bitter grudges in play, victory at an Immunity Challenge has never been more important. At Tribal Council, accusations fly as some tribe members are accused of being carried through the game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: As the game is coming close to the end, the taste of victory is closer than ever! Trust between the castaway's is at an all-time low and a bold move is made by a player to gain further power.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: As the pointy end of game closes in on the remaining five castaways, one player seeks revenge following last night's Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: With only a few days left in the game, physical strength dwindling & emotions at an all-time high, the castaways are granted an opportunity for Immunity, thus securing their place in the final three.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After 50 testing days, the remaining three castaways can finally see and feel the eagerly anticipated finish line ahead of them with one of the greatest battles for Immunity in front of them.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: The final two make their plea, with the Jury to vote on who will be crowned the title of Sole Survivor & win $500,000. Then, all 24 castaways reunite for an explosive & exciting reunion.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 20 of Survivor’s most beloved Heroes and most reviled Villains arrive in the South Pacific to compete for the title of Sole Survivor. In one of the most physical Reward Challenges ever played, injuries threaten to send two castaways home.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 2
programme.desc: One Villain pushes so hard to provide for the tribe that he passes out cold. The tribe worries that their strongest asset may be taken out of the game.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When one castaway finds himself in hot water with an ally, he must scramble to prove his loyalty. One tough Villain has the whole tribe on edge as everyone sets their sites on one very dangerous alliance.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Dragon Slayer reaches his breaking point and considers leaving the game. A clue to the Hidden Immunity Idol threatens to tear one tribe apart when a fight erupts about what should be done with the valuable information.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 5
programme.desc: In a grueling physical challenge, one castaway takes a hard fall that results in an injury so severe that it threatens to take him out of the game for good.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Heroes tribe continues to struggle in an effort to get their priorities straight. A division threatens to tear the tribe apart and send one of their strongest players home.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 7
programme.desc: With plenty to prove to his tribe, one castaway knows that he’s been given a last chance. Will he finally come through for the team?

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Both tribes find themselves eagerly anticipating the merge and arrive at the Reward Challenge ready for a big announcement. Struggling to keep their tribe in tact, the Heroes vow to work together to ensure that they outlast the Villains.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Reeling from the loss of an ally, one castaway scrambles to secure votes, fearing that she might be the next target. The Heroes develop a risky strategy in an effort to align themselves with one of the game’s most notorious players.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A Hero finds himself taking a gamble and placing trust in one of the game’s most notorious villains, despite objections from his wary alliance.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the wake of a game-changing Tribal Council, everyone struggles to find their place in the newly merged tribe and some panicked players consider making new allies in an effort to regain control of the game.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reeling from the departure of their ally, two castaways are forced to rethink their plans now that their alliance has been shattered.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The final six get the chance to earn time with their loved ones in a fiercely fought reward challenge. One castaway makes a surprising choice that sends ripples through the tribe and threatens to cost someone the million dollar prize.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 14
programme.desc: One castaway lets paranoia get the best of him as he targets a loyal ally. As the final tribal council draws near, everyone struggles to stay on top of their game as alliances crumble and everyone starts to play the game for themselves.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A one-hour live reunion.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 12 everyday Aussies take on 12 Australian Champions to see who can outwit, outplay & outlast to become the Sole Survivor.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Jess & Ricky have a heart to heart about their relationship. Lucy is back in town. The cast head to an 80’s Roller Disco and Joey has a HUGE secret to share with Billie…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a drama and romance-filled series finale, the boys face up to each other on the five-a-side football pitch and Joey jets Sam off to Dubai to pop the big question…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Team TOWIE is back and heading to the Costa-Del-Essex for a two part Marbella special – expect plenty of sun, sea, sangria and shenanigans as everyone’s favourites hit the beach and enjoy the nightlife on their annual Spanish jaunt.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…|Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As the sun sets on Marbella, Team TOWIE is back in Essex and the fallout from the Spanish expedition begins. Is it the beginning of the end for Joey and Sam? Will Lucy and Dan be more than just a holiday romance?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Loves young dream, will Diags finally find love? Lil Chris better watch out because Mario is on the war path. Is it make up or break up for TOWIE’s golden couple Joey and Sam?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. It’s a Father’s Day to remember with a big revelation from Dan. Chloe and Billie come to blows over Joey and Sam.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real life Orange County that is Essex. Is it the end of the road for Joey and Sam? Lucy and dad-to-be Dan have a heart to heart. Ricky has a big confession for Jess,.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: How are Joey and Sam adjusting to single life? Jess is on a mission to find out the truth about Ricky’s infidelity. Plus a there’s romantic night in for Diags and Abi…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ricky and Jess are reeling from Mario’s revelations and there’s an awkward showdown with the Wrights. James asks Sam to a day at the races. Bobby, Charlie and Gemma hit Essex Pride, and could there be family troubles brewing for Ferne and Charlie…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s Chloe’s first day of work experience at Essex Style Magazine. Ricky tries to rekindle the romance with Jess - but will he succeed? Mario and Lucy go head to head over Bentley.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey and the boys take to the tennis courts, Ricky tries to make a mend with the Wright family over a game of golf. Sam organizes a slap-up dinner at which Lucy discovers Dan is not as squeaky clean.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode of the current series, there has been a Murder in Essex and Abi is planning a Murder Mystery Birthday party. Jess has organized a single ladies 'hen again' party for mum Carol.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the final episode of the current series it's a glorious day for an Essex Wedding as Carol and Mark Wright celebrate their 30th anniversary by renewing their wedding vows. Lucy and Mario have a heart-to-heart.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A reality drama based on the gorgeous and glamorous characters that live it large in Essex. Tonight ….. Will Kirk go through with his tattoo? Will Mark turn up for Lauren’s birthday party?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness the fall out from Lauren’s party. How will Mark’s speed dating event turn out? Will Amy get to live the dream and become a top model? Can Kirk woo Amy and get the girl?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode, will Kirk’s special date for Amy seal their romance? How does Mark cope when temptation and jealousy enter the frame?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arg prepares for his performance at the 1960’s themed party but is thrown to hear that Lydia will be making an appearance

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Essex Fashion Week arrives, but who will win the prize for being the most glamorous Essex girl. Sam? Amy? Jessica?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On this episode of The Only Way Is Essex it’s VIP night at the opening of Mark’s new club

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode of the Only Way Is Essex, follow the tears, the tantrums and the triumphs of Amy, Mark, Sam, Kirk and Jessica.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: What will happen to the resdients of Essex in this episode?? Suffice to say there is drama and excitement on the cards for everyone…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Tonight on The Only Way Is Essex it’s firework night. But who’ll be causing them? Will it be Mark and Lauren? Or Amy and Kirk?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In this episode, will Nanny Pat like her makeover? Can Lauren accept her boss’s offer? Will sparks fly on Amy’s date? And can LOLA give the performance to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this last episode of the Only Way Is Essex, all roads lead to Romford for the big showdown. Yes it’s Mark’s boxing event and he’s thrown down the gauntlet to Kirk.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Geordies hit the road to host a Tash-On Tours hoedown for young farmers in Gloucestershire. \"Psycho\" Charlotte is back when she sees Gary talking to another girl. (S9, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Gary pretends to get a tattoo of Charlotte's initials behind his ear, but she freaks out and says something she regrets. Meanwhile there's drama between Aaron and Marnie. (S9, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the Geordie Shore house! But there are tears amidst the tinsel when Vicky returns with unexpected news. Kyle hopes for a special Xmas present from Holly. (S9, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: When Charlotte finds out about a pact between Gary and Aaron she hatches a plan - but will she end up with egg on her face? Meanwhile James is having doubts about his future in the house. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1002
programme.desc: James makes a shock announcement and two new housemates come through the door. But the newbies' first night out is ruined when a fight breaks out between Charlotte, Marnie and Holly. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1003
programme.desc: It's the Newbies' first morning in the house but with Holly, Kyle and Charlotte gone how will the family get back together? A shock revelation from Gary leaves Charlotte heartbroken. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1004
programme.desc: It's the day that Charlotte's been dreading, Gary introduces his new girlfriend to the family but will Psycho Charlotte put in an appearance? Meanwhile Marnie and Aaron get very flirty! (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1005
programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1101
programme.desc: The Geordies are back and buzzin' as big boss Anna sends them off to Greece! Holly and Kyle kick off, while Gaz and Charlotte find themselves in a very awkward situation. (S11, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1102
programme.desc: Big boss Anna sends the guys to their new home in Crete. Chloe wants to know where she stands with Scott. Charlotte and Marnie have some explaining to do after their first night in Malia. (S11, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1103
programme.desc: Gaz's pulling competition causes a bust up for Aaron and Scott. Charlotte tells Holly some home truths about Kyle while the toga party sees Chloe and Scott get closer than ever. (S11, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104
programme.desc: Chloe causes carnage at the boat party while Kyle comes to a big decision over Holly. Marnie sees Kyle at the club and the simmering tensions boil over and it all kicks off. (S11, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1106
programme.desc: Kyle and Hollys' split continues to divide the boys and girls. Scott upsets Chloe, Holly confronts Kyle while Charlotte goes to extraordinary lengths in search of a kebab. (S11, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1107
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1108
programme.desc: After his dramatic exit, the Geordies come to terms with life after Kyle. Chloe's plan to make Scott jealous backfires and Charlotte gives Holly some very tough love. (S11, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1109
programme.desc: Chloe confronts Scott and lets slip how she truly feels. Meanwhile, Marnie gets an unexpected call while Nathan has some big news for the family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1110
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1201
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1202
programme.desc: Charlotte finally turns up with some bunnies and some bigger news for Gaz. Will Holly share her secret? Aaron and Scott's dates with Chantelle end badly as the lads and Chloe all kick off. (S12, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1203
programme.desc: Charlotte gets the girls to go hard on Gaz, Scott drops the girlfriend bomb on Chantelle and Holly has a big bust up with Charlotte when she sees her kissing Chloe. (S12, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1204
programme.desc: With Holly away, Chloe and Charlotte's friendship goes next level. Chantelle's plan to test Scott goes badly wrong and Chloe is quick to take advantage. (S12, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1205
programme.desc: Gaz and Charlotte spend the night together, Chloe finally comes clean to Chantelle over what she gave Scott and it all kicks off. Plus there's one huge shock when Marnie returns. (S12, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1206
programme.desc: Chloe is buzzin' when a new lad arrives. Marnie goes mental when a girl of Aaron's turns up and it kicks off again when the newbie drops Scott right in it with Chantelle.(S12, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1207
programme.desc: Marnie necks on with new lad Marty to teach Aaron a lesson. Charlotte's got Chloe's back when it all kicks off between the girls. Gary and Charlotte end up in bed causing ripples. (S12, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 610
programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 614
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren gets a letter of apology from Heidi and realizes there's only one thing keeping them from being friends again. Audrina starts dating a new guy to make Justin jealous, but her plan backfires.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Audrina reconnects with an old flame Cory and finds herself juggling two guys. Spencer forces Heidi to kick her sister Holly out of the apartment.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lauren and Audrina travel to Cabo for Brody's birthday, but the party turns into a fight. Spencer humiliates Stephanie after learning that her new boyfriend is friends with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey but Justin won't give up on her. Stephanie has doubts about her new boyfriend after he fails to stand up to Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Audrina gets her own place, hoping Justin will move in with her but everyone fears she is moving for the wrong reason. Heidi invites Spencer to a work event and gets caught having a little too much fun.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, but when Spencer tries to get her old job back, he makes the situation much worse.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lauren lets Heidi's sister crash at her place. Justin asks Audrina to go away for a romantic weekend, and Heidi's frustration with Spencer grows after she has to beg for her job back.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Audrina believes a rumor she hears: that Lauren hooked up with Justin. Meanwhile Holly tries to get Heidi away from Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Audrina tries to save her friendship with Lauren after accusing her of hooking up with Justin. Spencer and Stephanie visit their grandmother who is fed up with their fighting.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and runaway to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with fallout of their elopment and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Their senior year is winding down and the kids from Laguna Beach are just getting started for their summer of fun...and drama.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The love triangle between Stephen, Kristin, and LC is becoming more obvious, and each of them is really starting to feel the pressure.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When LC, Stephen and Trey check out a designer fashion show in LA, LC watches Stephen's attention turn from fashion to fashion models.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's Christmas break in Laguna Beach. Kristin has ruled the school, LC is leaving San Francisco and the drama is all around.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Love and Laguna Beach mix like chocolate and onions. Things with Stephen and Kristin are dunzo, but what about him and LC? And rumors about Jason and Alex M abound.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's B-day time in LB for both Kristen and LC. Kristen and Talan flirt up a storm, while old feelings stir between Stephen and LC at her party south of the border.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jason and Talan stir up all kinds of trouble when their eyes start to wander from their girlfriends Jessica and Taylor.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's time to suit up for the LB Winter Formal and nothing causes more drama than a girl asks boy dance. Drama is what Jason gets when he goes with Alex M not Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Valentine's Day brings nothing but trouble for Jessica who's still desperately hanging on to Jason (whose heart is clearly elsewhere).

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The LB hotties head from the beach to the slopes to cheer up Jessica after Jason calls them dunzo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Jessica, Jason and Alex M. love triangle continues to get complicated when Alex finds out that Jessica and Jason have been hooking up again behind her back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Working undercover in his own company, Coby Brooks, President and CEO of Hooters is shocked to learn that his company may have a negative public perception.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Former Army man, Joe DePinto, now President and CEO of 7Eleven, goes undercover to work on his company's front lines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Todd Ricketts, one of the owners of the Chicago Cubs, goes undercover within one of baseball's most famous franchises and fights for the chance to redeem himself after being let go on the second day.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.desc: A woman shoots her ex-husband to death in front of their children.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Con man Joe Hunt forms an investment club with wealthy young men. The Ponzi scheme leads to murder when Hunt gets involved with Ron Levin, a notorious con man, himself.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 10

programme.desc: After arresting Fidel, the intelligence community learns that classified information still reaches Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 1

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A love-struck girlfriend hijacks a helicopter to pluck her man from jail and one of the world's biggest breakouts: 38 inmates in one go!

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Robert Durst is the former, high-profile real estate tycoon and star of HBO's The Jinx. He first gained the media's attention with the disappearance of his wife in 1982.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On 29 April 1996, Le Anh Tuan was kidnapped by three men from his Melbourne home. In broad daylight, neighbours watched as he was bundled into the boot of a car. His captors later demanded a $400,000 ransom for his safe return.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: March 1995 – when a skull is found at Botany Beach the police, crime scene examiners and the forensic pathologist, among other specialists, were brought to the scene.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 2

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Homeland Security special agents work with the DCIS to capture a Chinese software pirate.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The body of Jennifer Levin is discovered on the Upper East Side of Manhattan's Central Park. The chief suspect is handsome 19-year-old Robert Chambers, who blames her for her own death.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Samantha Bodsworth's body was found in a Noosa carpark. The killer thought he had committed the perfect murder but a little known area of forensic science would be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In December 1994 Andrew Astbury’s body was found floating in Melbourne’s Yarra River. He was a hard working, reliable 25-year-old man from a good family.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Elite DEA agents hunt down the world's biggest heroin trafficker amidst the Taliban insurgency.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In 1969, nine people are killed by a notorious cult leader with mostly female followers living in a commune. Among the brutally murdered is pregnant actress Sharon Tate.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In Middlesbrough we look at the story of a man who believed he had committed the perfect murder, and how diligent police work uncovered his identity, and his plans for further violent crimes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 31
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental brain fingerprinting technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 81
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 63
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 116
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 86
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 86
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 118
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 49
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 40
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 1

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 2

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: People are jumping into cages and getting up close to big, hungry sharks. But what happens when you purposely attract these animals?

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia is put to the test trying to catch on of Australia's fastest snakes. Barry gives Julia a tough decision to make. A keelback is on the loose. Finally, Johnny and Julia are faced with a grim situation.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Julia rescues a policeman from an unwelcome intruder. Johnny gets to go up against a venomous snake all on his own. And Julia gets to go explore at night in a leech infested forest.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's touch and go for a python that has been attacked by two dogs; Johnny's artistic side is ignited, and Julia tries to control some misbehaving kids.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Riley has a fear of stingrays. Like many people the death of Croc Hunter Steve Irwin led him to believe that stingrays are dangerous animals. But are they? To find out and to challenge his fear, Riley heads out to meet a bunch of stingrays.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia will get a love-bite from her favorite snake, Bonny the dog continues her snake detection training, and then there's a deadly wrangle with a juvenile eastern brown.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Julia rescues a terrified Russian rapper from a neighborhood "gangster", Johnny finds himself in a tug of war with a python and bonny gets her first shot looking for snakes in the field.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos shark and its behaviors. And that’s enough to get Shark Gordon interested.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 9

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 1

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3

programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: While hiking through Montana's Glacier National Park, Johan and Jenna Otter are attacked by a raging grizzly intent on protecting her cubs. In a remote British Columbia nature park, Patti and Kelly McConnell are mauled by a hungry 400-pound black bear.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The New Zealand sea lion is more than just the most endangered sea lion on Earth.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Johnny rescues a python in the poo, Julia starts a new business venture before facing off against two very deadly snakes.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Julia saves a karate school from a highly venomous visitor. Meanwhile, Johnny Bagpipes leaves his lady flying solo as he prepares to fly to Rome.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: Dinocroc vs. Supergator
programme.desc: Created in the laboratories of a biotech corporation, two ravenous mega-reptiles level everything in their way

programme.title: Dinoshark
programme.desc: A baby dinoshark evolves into a ferocious adult, terrorising tourists and locals offshore from Puerto Vallarta

programme.title: The Pursuit of D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: See what might have happened after DB Cooper's stunt of the century.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: A pre-teen rebel in WWII-occupied France unites a group of kids to protect a young Jewish girl from Nazis.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Strange lights over Los Angeles herald the arrival of malevolent aliens who threaten to swallow up humanity.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned, but bizarre things happen several years after his rebirth.

programme.title: Sands of Oblivion
programme.desc: An archaeologist couple and an Iraq War combat veteran uncover a replica of ancient Egypt made for a movie.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: Survive the Night
programme.desc: A doctor and his family are held hostage by a wounded gunman and his unhinged brother.

programme.title: Trauma Center
programme.desc: A detective teams up with an injured female witness to avenge the murders of his partner and an informant.

programme.title: Catch 44
programme.desc: Three friends get caught in a standoff with a psychopath, a truck driver, a line cook, and head crime boss.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A pair of aging stickup men try to get the old gang back together for one last hurrah.

programme.title: Rob-B-Hood
programme.desc: Thongs and Octopus grow attached to the baby they kidnapped for their landlord, which leads to complications.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Little ice sprites use Shimmer and Shine's palace for their games, turning it into a winter wonderland Samira offers Zeta the chance to be a genie again under one condition: she must grant Shimmer and Shine's wishes.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 619
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dora and her cousin Diego are on their way to a big surprise. It's Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus!

programme.desc: When Leah's party food accidentally gets run over by Zac, Leah needs to figure out what else to bring fast. Leah asks her genies for more Pigs in a Blanket, but the genies give her real pigs wrapped in a blanket!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: The Umizoomi Zoo!: A cute and cuddly Purple Monkey is moving into The Umi City Zoo today. But when he falls into the Penguin exhibit, it's Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Surprise: It's Boots' birthday! Dora tells him that all his friends are waiting at her house to give Boots a big party.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Leah wishes to be a genie for the day, Zeta uses magic to have Leah grant her wishes. / When Zac thinks the girls are missing, he plays detective and goes on the search with Kaz.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: There's only one thing that scares dinosaurs - the sound of thunder! So when a big storm frightens them away, Team Umizoomi must find the missing dinosaurs and lead them back home.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 999
programme.desc: Dora's Pirate Adventure: Yo ho ho! Dora and Boots and all their friends are putting on a pirate show today for their mommies and daddies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The girls travel with Shaya to an island where they meet the Animal Genie, who looks after all animals. / Shimmer and Shine tell Leah the story of how they met Tala and Nahal, with help from the Animal Genie.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When the magical rainbow water goes out of balance, Samira sends the girls through the waterfall to a new world – Rainbow Zahramay. There, they meet a Waterfall Genie who can help them bring balance to the water.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 995
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Mermaids: It's Clean-Up the Beach Day, as Dora and Boots are cleaning up garbage when they find a Singing Clam, who tells them the story of Mariana the Mermaid. Mariana lives in the Mermaid Kingdom at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Blaze transforms into a tow-truck, and, with the help of AJ and Gabby, sets off on a tow-tally awesome adventure to save Stripes.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora in Wonderland: While Dora's kitties run through a magic mirror, Dora becomes Dora in Wonderland! Join her and Boots on a double-length adventure through the magical, mixed-up world of Wonderland!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 1.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 6

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 114

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.desc: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
